sector_observations: AI Labs Pentagon-cohort bifurcation continues. Alphabet/Google (fortune-500 entry) -3.2; OpenAI -0.8; Microsoft 0 (already factored); Anthropic 0 (already factored); Amazon 0 (net-zero band call). Anthropic's Pentagon exclusion is the persistent positive differentiation in the cluster.

Q1 2026 Tech Layoff Wave produces consistent EMP/INT pressure. Oracle (-2.5) is the most procedurally aggressive layoff pattern; Amazon's NLRB labor positives partially offset its layoffs; Microsoft's voluntary retirement preserves established posture; Meta's NM Phase 2 conduct propagates to Meta AI (-0.8).

Conflict-floor cluster integrity maintained. Israel floor confirmed with new conduct categories (extraterritorial aid interdiction + foreign-civilian torture in custody). Ethiopia at 10.9 remains floor-proximate but not floor-designated.

First-baseline rotation produced 7 baseline establishments (India, Poland, Costco, PayPal, Barbados, Ghana, Andorra). Two new math-hygiene flags surfaced (Costco 79.4 vs. reconstructed 73.4; PayPal 77.9 vs. reconstructed 71.9) — pattern matches prior Open Bionics issue at smaller magnitude.
Ukraine peace-window watch flag activated for May 9 Victory Day; emergency re-queue protocol if sustained ceasefire framework agreed.
